purpose: Numeric reference for manuscript Conclusion and IGBT subsection (cross-domain verification). Values align with internal Table 9 / §4.10 reporting; regenerate with scripts/compute_igbt_monotonicity_metrics.py after training.
dataset_citation: NASA Prognostics Data Repository — IGBT accelerated aging (download separately; not redistributed in this repository).

experimental_setup.backbone: Model-based diffusion (MBD) + optional diffusion training; IGBTPhysics (monotonicity + optional coupling + smoothness per models/physics/igbt_physics.py)

baseline_for_L_mono_reduction.description: Unconstrained-baseline pathway used in the manuscript to define relative reduction of mean L_mono (physics-guided vs baseline).
baseline_for_L_mono_reduction.source: Post-hoc monotonicity loss on baseline-style trajectories (same evaluation code as compute_igbt_monotonicity_metrics.py).

derived.relative_reduction_formula: 100 * (1 - L_mono_guided_mean / L_mono_baseline_mean); guided mean taken as 9.57e-7, baseline as 6.343e-3

interpretation.soft_constraint: Low L_mono coexists with non-zero monotonicity_violation_ratio because penalties are soft and trajectories may exhibit small local deviations.
interpretation.cross_domain_claim: Same code path as C-MAPSS after replacing cmapss_dataset + compressor physics with igbt_dataset + IGBTPhysics.
